hero.subtitle: Propose elections, rank your choices, and trust the outcome. An open platform where the community decides what matters — and how it's measured.

steps.title: Propose
steps.text: Anyone can propose an election — a title, dates, and the options voters will rank.

steps.title: Approve
steps.text: The community votes to approve it. Reach two thirds and it goes live on the dates you set.

steps.title: Rank & decide
steps.text: Voters drag options into their order of preference. The winner reflects what the majority actually wants.

items.title: Preferential voting
items.text: Rank as many options as you like. No wasted votes, no spoiler effect.

items.title: Community gated
items.text: Proposals only become elections with two-thirds community approval — no single admin decides.

items.title: Open results
items.text: Every ranking is public. See the winner, the runners-up, and how close the race actually was.

items.title: Independently verifiable
items.text: Each ballot gets a receipt anyone can check — anchored on Algorand so the tally cannot be rewritten.

items.title: Multi-lingual
items.text: Vote in English, Spanish, or Catalan. Your voice, your language.

items.title: Accessible by design
items.text: Keyboard-friendly ranking, dark mode, reduced-motion support.

cta.title: Ready to let people decide?
cta.text: Draft a proposal in minutes. The community takes it from there.

org.title: Organizations
org.subtitle: Governance bodies you belong to, or that you manage.
org.census-hint: Add the initial members of this organization. You can modify the census later.
org.not-member: You are not a member of this organization

census.remove-hint: Select addresses to remove from the census.

dev-addresses.hint: Load the addresses declared to dev-accounts.json

csv.hint: First column = address, header row skipped automatically.

replace-confirm.title: Replace the entire census?
replace-confirm.text: This will replace {{current}} current members of "{{name}}" with {{next}} new addresses. This action cannot be undone.

proposal.starting-too-soon: Start date must be at least 3 days in the future
proposal.small-voting-window: Voting window must last at least 1 day
